description: A darkened graphic with a photograph of a smiling young woman with a bow in her hair, wearing a gray hooded sweatshirt with a 'LOVE' emblem, standing on a porch with parked cars behind her. Large white text across the lower portion reads 'THIS IS OUR WHY' and 'KAYLA HAMILTON', with 'NATIONAL CRIME VICTIMS WEEK' below and a small DHS seal.
notable_text: THIS IS OUR WHY; KAYLA HAMILTON; NATIONAL CRIME VICTIMS WEEK
